positive: A central, stylized, symmetrical pattern featuring interconnected abstract flora and fauna elements. The design should be a continuous, repeating motif suitable for tiling, rendered in a sophisticated Art Deco aesthetic mixed with natural botanical illustration. Use strong, clean black lines contrasting against a crisp off-white background. Key elements include stylized peacocks, geometric leaves, and abstracted mandalas forming a harmonious, elegant border or pattern. High contrast, minimal shading, bold silhouettes, perfect symmetry. Composition must be flat and print-ready for apparel printing. Clean vector art style, deep black ink.
negative: blurry, photorealistic, text, logo, watermark, signature, noisy, dirty, low resolution, low detail, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, human figures
